labels: bug

<!--
OPTIONAL SECTIONS — include only when warranted, delete otherwise:

## Suspected Root Cause
(Where you think the bug originates — speculative, not confirmed. Helps triage but remove if you genuinely have no hypothesis.)

## Workaround
(Any known way to avoid or mitigate the bug while it remains unfixed.)

## Related Issues
(Links to related issues, PRs, or commits.)

LABELS:
- `bug`        — apply to all bug issues
- `regression` — add when behavior previously worked and broke after a specific change

IMPACT LABELS (apply as many as fit):
- `crash`      — unrecoverable failure; game exits or freezes
- `data-loss`  — save data corrupted or lost
- `gameplay`   — incorrect game logic or rule violation
- `ui`         — visual glitch or layout problem
- `audio`      — sound issue

TITLE FORMAT:
- [Bug] Title In Title Case
- Title case throughout; no conventional-commit prefixes (feat:, fix:, etc.)
-->
